# PuFileUpload

## Intent

- single file upload
- single attachment input
- URL file entry

## Prefer When

- Use for one attachment value by picker, drag/drop, or URL.

## Avoid When

- Avoid for multi-file collections; use PuFilesUpload.

## Import

```ts
import { PuFileUpload } from '@partner-up-dev/design-web'
```
